changes.detail: grotontownhouses.com/floorplans still returns 404. Main site available at www.grotontownhouses.com/available-rentals. No static pricing changes detected vs April 18 confirmed: 1BR $1,875/mo, 2BR $2,050/mo. Both July 15, 2026 move-in.

grotonapartmenthomes.com/floorplans/ redirects to www.grotonapartmenthomes.com/floorplans/. Site still JS-rendered via SecureCafe — prices not statically available. Last confirmed: Studio $1,600–$1,775 (6 avail), 1BR Fairfield $1,895 (1 avail), 2BR Boston $2,058 (1 avail), 2BR Providence $2,262–$2,322 (2 avail). 1 MONTH FREE on select Fairfield 1BRs still active.

Direct site RealPage JS-rendered — no static prices in raw HTML. Playwright required for actual pricing. Last confirmed: 'Please Call' on direct site per April 18. Aggregators show $1,450–$1,875/mo range.

Direct site still Cloudflare-blocked. Availability dropped to 0 units per Trulia (April 18). Last confirmed pricing: Phase I 1BR $1,620, Phase II 1BR $1,750–$1,825, Phase I 2BR $1,670, Phase I Townhouse 2BR $1,850, Phase II 2BR $2,010–$2,110, 3BR $2,470/mo. Confirm availability at (860) 449-9999.
Site still JS-rendered (RentCafe platform). floorplans URL redirects. Last confirmed (April 18): 1BR $1,130–$1,190/mo, 2BR $1,285–$1,395/mo. Prices match stored data.
No dedicated property site. miradorliving.com is generic senior living portal. Last confirmed (April 18): 1BR $1,025/mo, 2BR $1,325/mo. Prices stable per aggregators.
Direct site b7properties.com/ambrose confirmed 1BR $1,995/mo and 2BR $2,345/mo (no 2,195 or 2,630). Prices match April 18 confirmed data. $99 community fee unchanged.
